commands.setup.title: Happy Spring Tomcat: Apply Debug Setup
commands.restart.title: Happy Spring Tomcat: Restart Tomcat
commands.showMenu.title: Happy Spring Tomcat: Show Menu
config.server.title: Happy Spring Tomcat - Server
config.httpPort.description: Tomcat HTTP connector port (`port` attribute in the `server.xml` HTTP Connector)
config.debugPort.description: JPDA debug port (the port VS Code attaches to)
config.preLaunchBuild.description:
Automatically run a build before starting Tomcat.
- `none`: no build
- `maven`: runs `mvn package -DskipTests`
- `gradle`: runs `./gradlew build -x test`
config.javaOpts.description: `JAVA_OPTS` environment variable passed to the JVM when Tomcat starts.
config.colorizeLogs.description:

config.autoOpenBrowser.description: Automatically open a browser when Tomcat starts successfully.
config.showStatusBar.description: Show the Tomcat shortcut menu in the status bar.
config.deployment.title: Happy Spring Tomcat - Context / Deployment
config.docBase.description:
**Webapp root directory** served by Tomcat (built war or exploded folder)  
e.g. `${workspaceFolder}/target/exploded`. [Select folder...](command:happy-spring-tomcat.selectDocBase)
config.hotReload.title: Happy Spring Tomcat - Hot Reload
config.sourceBase.description:
Source directory for **JSP/static file** hot reload (`webAppMount="/"`)  
Leave empty to skip PreResources generation.
config.classesBase.description:
Compiled output directory for **Java class** hot reload (`webAppMount="/WEB-INF/classes"`)  
Leave empty to skip PreResources generation.
config.jndi.title: Happy Spring Tomcat - JNDI
config.jndiResources.description:
List of JNDI `<Resource>` definitions to inject into Context.  
Edit directly in `settings.json`.

**Example:**
```json
"happySpringTomcat.jndiResources": [
  {
    "name": "jdbc/myDB",
    "auth": "Container",
    "type": "javax.sql.DataSource",
    "factory": "org.apache.tomcat.dbcp.dbcp2.BasicDataSourceFactory",
    "driverClassName": "oracle.jdbc.OracleDriver",
    "url": "jdbc:oracle:thin:@localhost:1521:ORCL",
    "username": "user",
    "password": "pass",
    "maxActive": "100",
    "maxIdle": "50",
    "maxWait": "-1"
  }
]
```
